(ii) zygote formation
(iii) embryo development
(iv) seed formation
(v) fruit formation
A) 5 B) 4
C) 3 D) 2
Page No.-34, Easy
2.4.1 Endosperm
101. Select correct statement-
A) Endosperm development proceeds
embryosac development
B) Endosperm development precedes
embryo development
C) Embryo development precedes
endosperm development
D) More than one option is correct

A) Haploid B) Diploid
C) Triploid D) Tetraploid

A) PEN undergoes successive nuclear
divisions
B) PEC undergoes successive cellular
divisions
C) PEN undergoes successive cellular
divisions
D) More than one option is correct

A) reserve food materials for plant cells
B) reserve food material for embryo
C) reserve food material for developing
zygote

105. Coconut water from tender coconutis
and white kernel is .
endosperm endosperm
endosperm endosperm
endosperm
